name: DoorLoop Property Management API
what_it_does: DoorLoop REST API for cloud-based property management platform targeting landlords and property managers. Enables AI agents to manage tenant lease and contact data retrieval for portfolio management, handle rent payment tracking and automated collection workflow integration, access maintenance request and work order data for property operations, retrieve unit availability and vacancy management data for leasing, manage tenant communication and document delivery tracking, handle property expense and accounting data integration, access tenant screening and application status management, retrieve lease expiration and renewal pipeline data, manage owner portal and investor reporting data, and integrate property management data with accounting, marketing, and communication platforms.
use_cases: Tracking rent payments from property management automation agents
Managing maintenance requests from operations automation agents
Monitoring lease expirations from renewal management agents
Generating owner reports from investor relations agents
not_for: Commercial real estate management without residential rental focus
Enterprise property management without SMB landlord and portfolio scale
Institutional real estate without independent landlord and PM company target
best_when: An independent landlord or property management company using DoorLoop wants AI agents to automate rent tracking, maintenance coordination, lease renewal management, and owner reporting.
avoid_when: PRIVACY RISK: Tenant data including financial information, SSNs (from screening), and payment history requires strict data governance — automated processing of tenant PII must comply with FCRA, state landlord-tenant law, and GDPR. Automated late fee assessment and eviction notice triggering requires jurisdiction-specific legal review.

auth.notes: DoorLoop uses API key authentication. Per-account credentials. API documentation via Open API feature page. Webhooks for property events. REST API with JSON. Miami, Florida HQ. Founded 2019. Fast-growing proptech startup. QuickBooks Online integration native. Zapier integration available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — monthly subscription per unit
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter ($59/mo for 20 units), Pro ($119/mo for 20 units), Premium ($169/mo for 20 units); per-unit pricing for larger portfolios
pricing.notes: Miami, Florida. Founded 2019. Private ($100M+ raised). Property management software market. Fast growing in independent landlord and small PM company segment. QuickBooks native integration. Strong UX focus vs. older PM software. Competes with Buildium and AppFolio for small-to-mid property manager market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer docs

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY RISK: Tenant screening data (SSN, credit, background) has strict FCRA requirements; automated access and processing requires permissible purpose and compliance controls
Automated late fees — late fee assessment is jurisdiction-specific; automated late fee application without jurisdiction rule validation creates landlord-tenant legal exposure
Eviction workflow caution — automated eviction notice triggering requires strict compliance with state landlord-tenant statutes; consult legal counsel before automating notice workflows
QuickBooks sync — DoorLoop has native QuickBooks sync; avoid parallel accounting automation that conflicts with native QuickBooks integration to prevent double-entry
Tenant communication compliance — automated tenant communications (rent reminders, notices) must comply with TCPA for SMS and CAN-SPAM for email; verify compliance before deployment
Newer API — DoorLoop API is relatively new (company founded 2019); API maturity and stability less proven than older PM software; expect more frequent changes
agent_readiness.security_notes: Property management and landlord software. SOC2, CCPA. API key. US. Tenant financial and personal data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Property management. SOC2, CCPA. API key. US. Tenant personal and financial data.
